_comment: Project hooks + allowlist for the Go/kubebuilder dev loop. gofmt runs on every Go edit; go/make build+test commands are allow-listed so the TDD loop doesn't prompt.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && [[ "$f" == *.go ]] && command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
